code: import React from'react';import{useDispatch,useSelector}from'react-redux';import{Link,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{toast}from'react-toastify';import{logoutUser}from'../redux/actions/authActions';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Header=()=>{const user=useSelector(state=>state.auth.user);const dispatch=useDispatch();const navigate=useNavigate();const handleLogout=()=>{dispatch(logoutUser());toast.info('You have logged out.');navigate('/');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:"site-header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"nav",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/",className:"brand",children:"Sneaker Shop"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-links",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/",className:"nav-link",children:"\u0420\u0459\u0420\xB0\u0421\u201A\u0420\xB0\u0420\xBB\u0420\u0455\u0420\u0456"}),user?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/profile",className:"nav-link",children:"\u0420\u045A\u0420\u0455\u0420\u0451 \u0420\xB7\u0420\xB0\u0420\u0454\u0420\xB0\u0420\xB7\u0421\u2039"}),user.role==='admin'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/admin",className:"nav-link nav-link-admin",children:"\u0420\u0452\u0420\u0491\u0420\u0458\u0420\u0451\u0420\u0405\u0420\u0454\u0420\xB0"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"user-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"user-badge",children:[user.username," | ",user.role]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"button button-danger button-inline",onClick:handleLogout,children:"\u0420\u2019\u0421\u2039\u0420\u2116\u0421\u201A\u0420\u0451"})]})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/login",className:"button button-inline",children:"\u0420\u2019\u0421\u2026\u0420\u0455\u0420\u0491"})]})]})});};export default Header;
